intent.raw: Run Task Session for SWU-LIR-001 until a real blocker and have a safe form ready to show tomorrow.
intent.objective: Implement and validate the non-collecting Time Capsule contract simulator without real intake, persistence, cryptography, deployment, or token effects.
intent.operator_sentence: Build the safest demonstrable form first.

steps.name: Build strict task context
stop_conditions: Any task obligation lacks controlling evidence, write scope, or validation.

steps.name: Execute bounded simulator task
stop_conditions: A change would enable collection, persistence, sealed cryptography, deployment, or token effects.

steps.name: Audit browser evidence and synchronize receipt
stop_conditions: Any done criterion fails after bounded repair.

gates.condition: All nine obligations are covered and the write/validation surfaces are explicit.
The 2026-07-17 request explicitly authorizes SWU-LIR-001 source mutation.
Interaction adds no requests, navigation, history, storage, analytics, or service worker.
Sealed remains disabled and no cryptographic guarantee is implemented or implied.
This route does not publish or deploy; publication requires a separate approval.

state_namespaces.write_policy: Browser memory only; refresh clears it.

promotion_splits.rule: L0 interaction evidence cannot authorize collection, sealed protection, deployment, or token effects.

promotion_guardrails: No real words, credentials, persistence, network intake, cryptography, deployment, or token state.
A simulated receipt or close state proves no identity, inclusion, confidentiality, durability, fairness, or allocation.
